headline: CN made ‘inaccurate claims’ on rail merger data: UP exec
summary: A Union Pacific executive disputed claims by Canadian National that it intentionally understated traffic it would take from rival railroads in its merger application with Norfolk Southern. The post CN made ‘inaccurate claims’ on rail merger data: UP exec appeared first on FreightWaves.

raw.headline: CN made ‘inaccurate claims’ on rail merger data: UP exec
raw.summary: A Union Pacific executive disputed claims by Canadian National that it intentionally understated traffic it would take from rival railroads in its merger application with Norfolk Southern. The post CN made ‘inaccurate claims’ on rail merger data: UP exec appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Norfolk Southern to announce first quarter 2026 earnings results on April 24, 2026
summary: Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC) will announce its first quarter 2026 financial results during a live conference call and internet webcast at 8:30 a.m. ET on Friday, April 24, 2026. Quarterly earnings results will be released in advance of the call and a press release will be posted on the Investors page of the company's website.

headline: Bernstein Maintains Outperform on Norfolk Southern, Lowers Price Target to $313
summary: Bernstein  analyst David Vernon   maintains Norfolk Southern (NYSE:NSC) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $322 to $313.

headline: 3 Large-Cap Stocks with Questionable Fundamentals
summary: Large-cap stocks are known for their staying power and ability to weather market storms better than smaller competitors. However, their sheer size makes it more challenging to maintain high growth rates as they’ve already captured significant portions of their markets.
